MINI MINUTES:

Appearances (via Zoom videoconference):
Atty. MELISSA SMITH, Esq. of Sheppard, Mullin, Richter & Hampton LLP (tel: 213-620-1780) for the Defendant Levi Strauss & Co.
No other appearances made in this matter.

Hearing Re: PLAINTIFF WINONA POWERS' Motion For Dismissal Of Entire Action With Prejudice.

The Court notes the moving party is not present. The Court inquires counsel for the defense as to plaintiff's counsel/movant's counsel whereabouts. Counsel Melissa Smith states she does not have any information as to why plaintiff's counsel is not present and states all the settlement funds have been disbursed. Upon conclusion of discussion, the Court takes the matter off calendar, due to failure to appear. The motion may be re-filed.
